name: Michele Scarpa
bio: 10+ years of experience in architecting digital products. Specialized in GIS systems, AI automation, and legacy modernization. Combining engineering rigor with a rapid prototyping mindset.

experiences.label: CURRENT
experiences.description: Cloud infrastructure on AWS with Terraform. Advanced performance testing with k6. Full integration of voice chatbots powered by OpenAI APIs to improve B2C experience and processes.

experiences.label: GIS LEAD
experiences.description: Architected geospatial systems for Public Administration handling 5M+ spatial records with <200ms response times. Led migration from Angular to React/GraphQL across enterprise codebases.

experiences.label: FULLSTACK
experiences.description: Developed web and mobile solutions for fleet management and environmental monitoring. Built cross-platform interfaces integrating real-time geospatial data feeds.

experiences.label: FULLSTACK
experiences.description: Engineered a complete IoT ecosystem for 500+ active professional digital signage installations, managing the full stack from firmware to cloud.

coreAreas.title: Web & Mobile Ecosystems
coreAreas.description: Architecting cross-platform interfaces with Next.js, Angular, Vue, and Svelte. Native Android development with Kotlin, combined with a strong focus on performance, state management, and seamless UX across the stack.

coreAreas.title: Enterprise GIS Context
coreAreas.description: Translating spatial data into actionable intelligence. Specialist in high-load geospatial infrastructure and map rendering.

coreAreas.title: AI & Conversational UX
coreAreas.description: Integrating LLMs into business workflows. Building robust RAG systems and context-aware chatbot orchestration.

projects.title: AI-Driven Decision Engine
projects.description: Complex TDD-based system developed solo, replacing the output of a 4-person team via agentic AI workflows.

projects.title: Big Data GIS Systems
projects.description: Geospatial architectures for Government projects, ensuring sub-200ms responsiveness at scale.

projects.title: Digital Signage Ecosystem
projects.description: Full-stack IoT ecosystem for professional installations, managing everything from hardware to browser.

community.label: FOUNDER
community.title: Co-founder, BacaroTech
community.description: Leading a tech community and managing media partnerships for national events. Aggregating expertise across multiple industry professionals.

community.label: DEVREL
community.title: DevRel & GDG Speaker
community.description: Regular speaker at Google Developer Groups, sharing practices on SvelteKit, agentic workflows, and advanced Frontend methodologies.

videos.title: Devfest Torino - Frontend On Stage: Mastering Performance with Svelte, Angular, React
videos.description: A talk on frontend frameworks presented at Devfest Torino. Explains the basics of Svelte (compile-time without heavy runtime), Angular (Change Detection), and React (Virtual DOM). Includes stress-tests on a complex UI and compares their speed and efficiency benchmarks.

videos.title: Devfest Roma Città - Pokedex Comparison - DevEx and Web Vitals
videos.description: Talk given at DevFest Roma comparing Svelte, React, and Angular by building the same Pokedex application. Analyzes Developer Experience (DevEx) and performance using Core Web Vitals. Demonstrates the use of Lighthouse and Chrome Dev Tools.

videos.title: Frontend Dilemma Live Discord
videos.description: Recording of the first live event of 2025 on Discord. Discusses how to choose the best frontend framework for your career. Explores the evolution of JavaScript from jQuery to modern frameworks, explaining CSR vs SSR and the Virtual DOM.

videos.title: Arcade THREEJS - PT1
videos.description: Shows the development of a 3D Arcade game using Three.js, born as a corporate 'Secret Santa' gift. Describes the technical challenges of converting prototypes written in Unity and Python for face/hand tracking into pure browser-based JS.

videos.title: Keycloak - Theme Customization - PT1
videos.description: First part of a tutorial dedicated to Keycloak. Explains how to customize the standard login page by cloning the base theme, using FreeMarker Templates (ftl), and injecting Tailwind CSS.

videos.title: Keycloak - Theme Customization - PT2
videos.description: Sequel focusing on JavaScript injection inside ftl pages. Analyzes binding between server-generated Java variables and JS. Introduces Vite, Webpack, and Alpine.js for lightweight DOM manipulation.

videos.title: Keycloak - React Theme Customization - PT1
videos.description: Third episode preparing the integration of React for custom themes. Clarifies SPA logic compared to Keycloak's Server-Side Rendering (ftl).

videos.title: Keycloak - React Theme Customization - PT2
videos.description: Final chapter on React integration in Keycloak. Shows the complete process: creating a Vite project, building, and linking React assets inside the Keycloak theme.

videos.title: Postman - How to Auto-Update Environment Variables?
videos.description: Quick tip on optimizing API tests in Postman. Uses 'Tests' and pre-request scripts to capture the Access Token from a login response and save it automatically as an environment variable.

videos.title: Postman - How to Use Environment Variables?
videos.description: Introductory guide on using environment variables in Postman. Shows how to parameterize URLs and auth tokens to speed up development.

videos.title: Throttling - What is it and why use it?
videos.description: UI/UX tutorial showing how to use 'Network Throttling' in Dev Tools. Explains the usefulness of simulating slow connections during development to verify loading states.
